'''âsh-w-b-th''' ('''kashawbethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:earthquake|earthquake]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-w-b-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:earthquake|earthquake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-w-b-th
|-
! Lemma
| kashawbethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishawbethoko|thishawbethoko]] || [[word:jishawbethoko|jishawbethoko]] || [[word:shishawbethoko|shishawbethoko]] || [[word:kishawbethoko|kishawbethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushawbethoko|thuthushawbethoko]] || [[word:jujushawbethoko|jujushawbethoko]] || [[word:shushushawbethoko|shushushawbethoko]] || [[word:kukushawbethoko|kukushawbethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
